news.title: Após 10 anos, A-100 abre primeiro restaurante fora da Grande Lisboa este sábado - nit.pt
news.summary:
# Summary

After 10 years of operation, the popular Lisbon restaurant A-100 is opening its first location outside the Greater Lisbon area this Saturday. This expansion makes the restaurant more accessible to visitors and locals in other regions of Portugal. Food enthusiasts who have wanted to experience A-100's cuisine without traveling to the capital now have a convenient new option.

news.title: Um restaurante no céu de Lisboa: Sky Lounge eleva almoços e jantares a 50m de altura - Público
news.summary:
# Summary

Sky Lounge, a new rooftop restaurant in Lisbon, offers dining experiences 50 meters above the city with panoramic views. The venue elevates both lunch and dinner service to a unique height, combining cuisine with spectacular skyline vistas. Visitors to Lisbon would want to experience this spot for its distinctive combination of food, atmosphere, and bird's-eye views of the city.

news.title: Com cozinha de fogo e de tacho, Vasco Coelho Santos quer conquistar Lisboa - Expresso
news.summary:
# Summary

Chef Vasco Coelho Santos is opening a new restaurant in Lisbon featuring traditional Portuguese cooking methods with open fire and pot-based dishes. Visitors to Lisbon should care because this represents an authentic, classically-focused dining option that emphasizes time-honored culinary techniques rather than modern fusion cuisine. It's a notable addition to the city's restaurant scene for those seeking traditional Portuguese gastronomy.
